race.comment: BIG TECH (4) just missed the placings in town last time out and should find this assignment a touch easier. Maps ideally for this from gate three and looks the one they all have to run down. TORMANZOR (3) brings NSW formlines to the table and will be ready to peak now third-up from the break. Rates among the leading prospects. The well-related VERRY STELLA (9) (full to 11xG1 winner Verry Elleegant) has been plying her trade in tougher contests down south and must be respected out of the champion Waller barn. Include in calculations. MOMENT (10) has placed at the past couple and may earn some minor money again. CONTINENT (7) best of the rest from the inside marble.
